Class Animal

java.lang.Object
shelter.domain.Animal
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<Animal>
Direct Known Subclasses:
Cat, Dog, Other, Rabbit
public abstract class Animal extends Object implements Comparable<Animal>
Abstract base class representing an animal available for adoption at a shelter. Concrete subclasses (e.g., Dog, Cat, Rabbit) must implement getSpecies() to identify their species and may add species-specific attributes.

  • Constructor Details

    • Animal

      protected Animal(String id, String name, String breed, LocalDate birthday, ActivityLevel activityLevel, boolean vaccinated, String adopterId, String shelterId)
      Reconstruction constructor for deserializing an Animal from persistent storage. This constructor accepts an explicit id so that the original identifier is preserved when reloading from CSV or other external sources.
      Parameters:
      id - the pre-existing unique identifier; must not be null or blank
      name - the animal's name; must not be null or blank
      breed - the animal's breed; must not be null or blank
      birthday - the animal's date of birth; must not be null
      activityLevel - the animal's activity level; must not be null
      vaccinated - whether the animal has been vaccinated
      adopterId - the ID of the adopter who adopted this animal, or null if available
      shelterId - the ID of the shelter this animal belongs to, or null if unassigned
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any required parameter is null, blank, or invalid

    • Animal

      protected Animal(Animal other)
      Copy constructor that creates a new Animal with all field values copied from other. The copy shares the same id so it represents the same entity in persistent storage. Mutable fields (vaccinated, adopterId, shelterId) are copied by value.
      Parameters:
      other - the Animal instance to copy; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if other is null

    • Animal

      protected Animal(String name, String breed, LocalDate birthday, ActivityLevel activityLevel, boolean vaccinated)
      Constructs a new Animal with the given core attributes. All parameters are required and validated; birthday must not be null. The animal is initialized as available for adoption (adopterId is null).
      Parameters:
      name - the animal's name; must not be null or blank
      breed - the animal's breed; must not be null or blank
      birthday - the animal's date of birth; must not be null
      activityLevel - the animal's activity level; must not be null
      vaccinated - whether the animal has been vaccinated
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any parameter is null, blank, or invalid

  • Method Details

    • getSpecies

      public abstract Species getSpecies()
      Returns the species of this animal. Each concrete subclass must return its own immutable Species constant.
      Returns:
      the Species of this animal

    • isMatchable

      public boolean isMatchable()
      Returns whether this animal is eligible for the matching system. Returns true by default; subclasses that cannot be matched (e.g., Other) should override this to return false.
      Returns:
      true if this animal can be matched with adopters

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Returns the unique identifier of this animal. The ID is generated automatically at construction time and never changes.
      Returns:
      the UUID string identifying this animal

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the name of this animal.
      Returns:
      the animal's name

    • setName

      public void setName(String name)
      Updates the name of this animal. The new name must not be null or blank.
      Parameters:
      name - the new name; must not be null or blank
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if name is null or blank

    • getBreed

      public String getBreed()
      Returns the breed of this animal.
      Returns:
      the animal's breed

    • getBirthday

      public LocalDate getBirthday()
      Returns the date of birth of this animal. The birthday is immutable and set at construction time.
      Returns:
      the animal's birthday as a LocalDate

    • getAge

      public int getAge()
      Returns the age of this animal in whole years, calculated from birthday to today. The result is always non-negative and reflects the current date.
      Returns:
      the animal's age in years

    • getActivityLevel

      public ActivityLevel getActivityLevel()
      Returns the activity level of this animal.
      Returns:
      the animal's ActivityLevel

    • setActivityLevel

      public void setActivityLevel(ActivityLevel activityLevel)
      Updates the activity level of this animal. The new activity level must not be null.
      Parameters:
      activityLevel - the new activity level; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if activityLevel is null

    • isVaccinated

      public boolean isVaccinated()
      Returns whether this animal has been vaccinated.
      Returns:
      true if the animal is vaccinated, false otherwise

    • setVaccinated

      public void setVaccinated(boolean vaccinated)
      Updates the vaccination status of this animal. Typically called by VaccinationService after administering vaccines.
      Parameters:
      vaccinated - the new vaccination status

    • isAvailable

      public boolean isAvailable()
      Returns whether this animal is currently available for adoption. An animal is available if it has not yet been adopted by anyone.
      Returns:
      true if no adopter has claimed this animal, false otherwise

    • getAdopterId

      public String getAdopterId()
      Returns the ID of the adopter who adopted this animal, or null if not yet adopted.
      Returns:
      the adopter's ID string, or null

    • getShelterId

      public String getShelterId()
      Returns the ID of the shelter this animal currently belongs to, or null if unassigned. This field is the persistent reference used to associate an animal with its shelter.
      Returns:
      the shelter's ID string, or null

    • setShelterId

      public void setShelterId(String shelterId)
      Assigns this animal to the shelter with the given ID. Typically called by AnimalService when an animal is admitted or transferred.
      Parameters:
      shelterId - the ID of the shelter; must not be null or blank
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if shelterId is null or blank

    • setAdopterId

      public void setAdopterId(String adopterId)
      Records that this animal has been adopted by the given adopter. Typically called by AdoptionService when an adoption request is approved.
      Parameters:
      adopterId - the ID of the adopter; must not be null or blank
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if adopterId is null or blank

    • compareTo

      public int compareTo(Animal other)
      Compares this animal to another by name alphabetically. Animals with the same name are considered equal for ordering purposes.
      Specified by:
      compareTo in interface Comparable<Animal>
      Parameters:
      other - the other Animal to compare to
      Returns:
      a negative number if this name comes first, positive if later, zero if equal

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object o)
      Returns true if the given object is an Animal with the same ID. Animal identity is determined solely by UUID since names and other attributes are mutable.
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Parameters:
      o - the object to compare
      Returns:
      true if o is an Animal with the same ID

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code based on this animal's unique ID. Consistent with equals(Object).
      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object
      Returns:
      the hash code

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this animal including its species, name, breed, and birthday.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a human-readable description of this animal
